# Leonardo Tales

Leonardo Tales is an AI-agent operating system for autonomous workflows, intelligent integrations, and self-healing digital infrastructure.

Default language: Turkish
Secondary language: English

Core concepts:
- AI agents
- Autonomous workflows
- Intelligent integrations
- Multi-agent orchestration
- Long-term memory and knowledge systems
- Self-healing automation
- Secure, scalable digital infrastructure

Primary routes:
- / — Turkish homepage
- /en — English homepage
- /manifesto — Turkish manifesto
- /en/manifesto — English manifesto

Who it helps:
Leonardo Tales helps founders, teams, and digital businesses design agentic systems that can coordinate work, integrate with existing tools, automate workflows, and improve operational intelligence.

What it builds:
Leonardo Tales builds multi-agent frameworks, cognitive integration layers, edge-scale memory infrastructure, and self-healing automation loops.
